notableEvents.label: Drake Baldwin GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Drake Baldwin grounds into a double play, shortstop Cooper Pratt to first baseman Jake Bauers. Mauricio Dubón out at 2nd. Drake Baldwin out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Cooper Pratt GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Cooper Pratt grounds into a double play, shortstop Ha-Seong Kim to second baseman Ozzie Albies to first baseman Matt Olson. Garrett Mitchell to 3rd. Sal Frelick out at 2nd. Cooper Pratt out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Cooper Pratt rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Cooper Pratt grounds into a double play, shortstop Ha-Seong Kim to second baseman Ozzie Albies to first baseman Matt Olson. Garrett Mitchell to 3rd. Sal Frelick out at 2nd. Cooper Pratt out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Wild pitch run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Wild pitch by pitcher Reynaldo López. Garrett Mitchell scores.
